zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Kosels於1575年4月3日出生在德國巴登-爾特波格時，她的父親Michaelis Kosels25歲，母親Barbara Kosel25歲。她於1598年1月31日與Leonhardt Widmann在德國爾特波格格拉布洛倫格拉布洛倫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara Kosels于1575年4月3日出生在德国巴登-爾特波格时，她的父亲Michaelis Kosels25岁，母亲Barbara Kosel25岁。她于1598年1月31日与Leonhardt Widmann在德国爾特波格格拉布洛倫格拉布洛倫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Kosels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Egon, Erwin, Hans, Horst, Kurt, Otto.
German (also Kösel): habitational name from any of several places called Kosel in eastern Germany and Schleswig-Holstein.
German: variant of   Kusel   1, a nickname meaning ‘spinning top’.

variants.name: Kusel
meanings: North German (also Küsel): nickname from Middle Low German kusel ‘spinning top’, perhaps applied to a squat but agile person.
South German: nickname from Middle High German kuose ‘female calf’ or ‘sheep’.

variants.name: Kozel
meanings: Ukrainian, Belorussian, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic kozel ‘he-goat’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a he-goat, or else a metonymic occupational name for a goatherd. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenian variant Kozelj. Compare Kosel 6.

Americanized form of Slovenian Koželj: nickname or metonymic occupational name from koželj ‘upper part of a spindle (distaff)’. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the variant Kožel.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Kosels was born on 3 April 1575, in Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Michaelis Kosels, was 25 and her mother, Barbara Kosel, was 25. She married Leonhardt Widmann on 31 January 1598, in Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara Kosels est née le 3 avril 1575, à Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Michaelis Kosels, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Barbara Kosel, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Leonhardt Widmann le 31 janvier 1598, à Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara Kosels am 3. April 1575 in Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Michaelis Kosels 25 und ihre Mutter Barbara Kosel 25. Sie hat am 31. Januar 1598 in Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Deutschland Leonhardt Widmann geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Kosels è nata il il 3 aprile 1575 nel Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Michaelis Kosels, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Barbara Kosel, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Leonhardt Widmann il 31 gennaio 1598, nel Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara Koselsが1575年4月3日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグで生まれた時，父Michaelis Koselsは25歳，母Barbara Koselは25歳であった。1598年1月31日にドイツウuルッテンバーグジャーアブロンジャーアブロンでLeonhardt Widmannと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Kosels(이)가 1575년 4월 3일 독일 바데-wu르테버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michaelis Kosels(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara Kosel(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1598년 1월 31일 독일 wu르테버그 제라브론 제라브론에서 Leonhardt Widmann(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara Kosels nasceu em 3 de abril de 1575, em Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Michaelis Kosels, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Barbara Kosel, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Leonhardt Widmann em 31 de janeiro de 1598, em Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Kosels родилась 3 апреля 1575 г. в местности баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Michaelis Kosels было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Barbara Kosel, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leonhardt Widmann 31 января 1598 г. в местности джирабронн, джирабронн, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara Kosels nació el 3 de abril de 1575, en Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Michaelis Kosels, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Barbara Kosel, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Leonhardt Widmann el 31 de enero de 1598, en Gerabronn, Gerabronn, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
